items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Team hitting ratings
items.description: Stay ahead of the game and optimize your fantasy baseball hitters with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's hitting matchups as well as the potential for stolen bases.

items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Pitcher projections for the next 10 days
items.description: Keep up to date on who is pitching -- and how well they're expected to do -- with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's probable starting pitchers with game score projections.

items.headline: Babar rediscovers his gears to score his fastest PSL century
items.description: He faced only one dot in a 52-ball hundred and complemented Kusal Mendis before taking centrestage to extend prolific season

items.headline: Arya comes, Arya sees, Arya conquers in a blaze of mighty sixes
items.description: On another day, Cooper Connolly's 46-ball 87 would have been the innings of the match, but Priyansh Arya's 37-ball 93 gave it no chance

items.headline: Toto Wolff on F1 changes: 'Act with a scalpel, not a baseball bat'
items.description: Mercedes team boss Toto Wolff has warned against taking a "baseball bat" to Formula 1's controversial 2026 technical regulations, saying he expects Monday's crunch meeting on the rules to end with targeted changes to improve the spectacle.

items.headline: Burnley vs Manchester City: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
items.description: All you need to know ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Burnley and Manchester City.

items.headline: Moni, Sharmin help Bangladesh register maiden ODI win against Sri Lanka
items.description: Bangladesh lost four wickets for one run when they were close to the finish line, but averted disaster in the end

items.headline: Premier League now Man City's to lose, Bayern clinch Bundesliga, more
items.description: Man City's win over Arsenal has thrown the title race back in City's favor, plus Bayern clinch the Bundesliga and Man United beat Chelsea to move closer to a Champions League return. Gab Marcotti recaps the weekend.

items.headline: Liverpool's Dominik Szoboszlai 'relaxed' over new contract,' but 'no real progression'
items.description: Dominik Szoboszlai has insisted he is "completely relaxed" about his contract situation at Liverpool despite the lack of progress over a new deal.
